• Celestica is working directly with multiple AI hyperscalers and is ramping up production of 800G and 1.6T networking equipment.
• The company averaged 22% revenue growth between FY22-FY25 and saw GAAP earnings skyrocket from $0.83 to $7.16 per share.
• Despite reaching new highs, Celestica's earnings growth outlook suggests the stock may still be undervalued.
news.Keywords: AI Data Center, Earnings Growth, Revenue Growth, Networking Equipment, Zacks Rank #1

news.Title: Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg Just Hinted at the Next Big Thing in AI -- and These 3 Stocks Will Likely Profit the Most
news.Content: What was the big story with Meta Platforms ' (NASDAQ: META) first-quarter update? Some might say that it was the company's increased capital expenditures on artificial intelligence (AI) infrastructure. Others could vote for Meta's strong revenue and earnings growth. I think, though, that the most important story from Meta's latest investor update with a long-term perspective is something CEO Mark Zuckerberg briefly mentioned. Zuckerberg just hinted at the next big thing in AI. And investors who pay attention ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg hinted at AI model self-improvement as the next big thing in AI, beyond just coding.
• Self-improving AI models can learn continuously and refine themselves, potentially accelerating AI advances exponentially.
• Nvidia (NVDA) is well-positioned to profit from self-improving AI due to the high GPU intensity of continuous training.
• Broadcom (AVGO) is a likely winner due to its leadership in high-speed networking required for AI clusters.
• The development of self-improving AI could blur the lines between training and inference, driving demand for more powerful GPUs and networking solutions.
news.Keywords: AI Self-Improvement, GPU Demand, Networking Technology, Nvidia, Broadcom

news.Title: 【發哥3千元1】大牛股變妖股！聯發科市值突破5兆元 挑戰台達電奪回二哥寶座
news.Content:
IC設計龍頭聯發科（2454）今（5）日再度亮燈漲停，衝上3,155元歷史新天價，市值突破5兆元大關，逼近台達電（2308），重返台股市值二哥之爭。另外，隨著聯發科股價較去年幾近翻倍漲，也帶動億元級持股人數增加600餘人。

聯發科今日股價一字鎖漲停，一舉越過3000元整數大關，奔至3,155元歷史新天價，成交金額達268.42億元，市值突破新台幣5兆元，來到5兆603億元，死命緊追台達電（2308）5兆6236億元，奪回二哥寶座。

聯發科創富 年增607名億元富翁

根據集保中心統計，去年5月9日，聯發科股價約1300元左右，當時股東人數22萬1,750人，其中持有77張以上為億元富翁，確定持股超過100張的股東僅1388人。

至於持股50張至100張的準億元富翁共有683人，若依照比例平均推估，人數估約314人，總共約1,702人。

截至上周四（4/30），聯發科股價已來到2,685元，股東人數則增至29萬4,031人，其中持有38張以上即為億元富翁，確定持股40張股東來到2,172人。

另外，持股30-40張的準億元富翁共有683人，若按比例平均推估，人數約137人，總共約2,309人；一年間新增607名億元富翁。

王詩婷／財經特派記者，主跑勞動部、半導體、生技等

Q2 was another massive beat-and-raise quarter, with Apple surging past estimates on both lines over the past four quarters by a wide margin. news.Title: Exclusive-Tesla faces EU skepticism over automated-driving tech, records show
news.Content: By Marie Mannes and Chris Kirkham May 5 (Reuters) - Tesla CEO Elon Musk has projected confidence that the European Union will soon green-light the carmaker's "Full Self-Driving" (FSD) system, but emails from some European regulators show marked skepticism toward the technology and its stated safety benefits. Tesla's "FSD (Supervised)" technology got the nod from Dutch road regulator RDW in April. RDW is now seeking EU approval for FSD, with ‌a key committee hearing scheduled for Tuesday. "We expect to be approved in a lot of other countries," Musk told analysts on ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Tesla faces skepticism from European regulators regarding its 'Full Self-Driving' (FSD) technology.
• Concerns raised by regulators include the system's tendency to speed, safety on icy roads, and driver circumvention of safety features.
• Tesla CEO Elon Musk expressed confidence in upcoming EU approval for FSD, aiming for robotaxi approval thereafter.
• European sales for Tesla fell 27% in 2025, and FSD approval is seen as crucial for regaining market share.
• Regulators in the Netherlands, Sweden, Finland, and Denmark have expressed concerns via email correspondence.
news.Keywords: FSD, European regulators, skepticism, safety concerns, market share, autonomous driving

news.Title: STMicroelectronics Touts LEO Boom: Sees Space Revenue Near €1B in 2026, €3B+ Through 2028
news.Content: Key Points ST projects it could be close to €1 billion in space revenue in 2026 and aims for well above €3 billion in cumulative space revenue across 2026–2028, with its LEO serviceable market forecast rising to roughly €2 billion by 2028 and near €3 billion by 2030. ST says LEO revenue jumped from about $175M in 2021 to ~$600M in 2025 (≈36% CAGR) and claims an RF market share above 90% in 2025, supported by a decade-plus co‑development with SpaceX that has delivered >7.5 billion ICs into millions of Starlink terminals and over 10,000 satellites. ST’s competitive edge rests ...
news.AI_Summary:
• STMicroelectronics (STM) projects space revenue to reach nearly €1 billion in 2026 and exceed €3 billion cumulatively through 2028.
• The company's Low Earth Orbit (LEO) serviceable market is forecast to grow to roughly €2 billion by 2028 and near €3 billion by 2030.
• STM's LEO revenue grew from approximately $175 million in 2021 to ~$600 million in 2025, a 36% CAGR.
• The company claims over 90% RF market share in LEO for 2025, supported by a decade-long partnership with SpaceX.
• Growth drivers include lower launch costs, satellite standardization, and user terminal innovation.

news.Title: 華邦電法說會下午登場！股價暖身上漲3%一度站回百元 分析師：尚未轉強
news.Content:
記憶體大廠華邦電（2344）今（5）日下午將召開法說會，市場關注對下半年市況的最新定調。華邦電今（5）日盤中股價暖身上漲約3%，暫報在98.6元，盤中一度重返百元關卡來到100.5元。分析師表示，華邦電技術面仍受季線下彎壓抑，後續走勢關鍵在於法說會是否釋出新利多，帶動資金進一步回流。

華邦電法說會將揭露首季獲利與訂單動態，市場預期華邦電客戶訂單轉強，主動洽談長期合作，顯示利基型DRAM需求旺盛，Flash市場回溫，有望帶動營運成長。

華冠投顧分析師陳韋廷指出，記憶體族群已進行約三個月的中期整理，相較於其他個股，華邦電目前技術面較為弱勢，其季線仍維持下彎趨勢並構成上方壓力，需待季線轉為上揚才有利多頭操作。

陳韋廷說明，目前的觀察重點在於法說會是否能釋出具備市場熱度的新消息，若單純以技術面考量，其優先順序尚不及其他已突破的同業如南亞科（2408），尤其南亞科已成功突破季線，強勢度明顯較高，是目前同族群中較具備市場青睞與題材支撐的個股。

受惠記憶體缺貨漲價，華邦電第一季累計營收達382.53億元，季增43.67%、年增91.34%，創單季營收新高；而1月稅後純益達27.83億元，年增562.29%，每股稅後盈餘0.62元，單月就賺達去年第四季0.76元的8成以上，預估第一季獲利將顯著優於去年同期與上季。

王詩婷／財經特派記者，主跑勞動部、半導體、生技等

Margin and monetization upside: Management expects AI ...

news.Title: 南亞科前4月營收超越去年全年 股價大漲逾半根停板慶賀
news.Content:
記憶體大廠南亞科（2408）4月營收衝上254.91億元，再寫歷史新高，累計前4月營收達745億元，一舉超越去年全年水準。受此激勵，今（5）日股價走高大漲逾半根停板；截至上午10時15分，暫報250.5元，上漲5.7%，成交量逾12萬張。

南亞科4日公告4月營收254.91億元，月增40.29％、年增717.33％，第六度改寫單月營收新高紀錄。

南亞科累計今年前4月合併營收為新台幣745.78億元，年增623.58%；並且已超越2025年全年營收665.86億元。

展望後市，南亞科總經理李培瑛在上回法說會表示，今年無法滿足客戶需求，明年情況也相近，預期DRAM廠可望維持數季高毛利。另外，公司目前DDR5營收約占10%，並可視需求彈性調整增加，同時持續供應DDR4及LPDDR4產品，以緩解市場缺口。

策略布局上，南亞科完成約787億元私募，引進晟碟（Sandisk）、思科（Cisco）、鎧俠（Kioxia）及SK海力士集團等美、日、韓四巨頭資金入股，持股約10.9％，並簽長期供貨合約，涵蓋既有及未來產能，提升訂單穩定性與價格能見度。

王詩婷／財經特派記者，主跑勞動部、半導體、生技等

news.Title: V2X Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
news.Content: Key Points Strong Q1 and raised guidance: V2X reported Q1 revenue of $1.25 billion (up 23% YoY), adjusted EBITDA of $85.6 million (up 28%) and adjusted EPS of $1.53 (up 55%), and management raised 2026 guidance to revenue of $4.825–$4.975 billion, adjusted EBITDA $345–$360 million, and adjusted diluted EPS $5.75–$6.15. Massive bookings and backlog: Quarterly bookings were about $4.1 billion and total backlog hit a record $13.8 billion, with the T-6 award contributing $3.3 billion and management saying ~94% of backlog revenue is under contract with multi-year visibility. Tech investments and healthy liquidity plan: V2X is rolling out enterprise AI ...
news.AI_Summary:
• V2X reported strong Q1 results with revenue of $1.25 billion (up 23% YoY) and raised its 2026 guidance.
• The company secured massive bookings of $4.1 billion, pushing its total backlog to a record $13.8 billion.
• V2X is rolling out enterprise AI platforms and building an AI-enabled sustainment prototype with partners like Google and NVIDIA.
• The company ended the quarter with ~$200 million cash and expects net leverage to fall below 2x by end-2026.
• The T-6 award contributed $3.3 billion to the quarterly bookings.
news.Keywords: Q1 earnings, revenue growth, bookings, backlog, AI platforms, guidance increase

news.Title: 【Yahoo早盤】台股觸及40885點新高後跌逾百點！分析師黃宇帆：收盤小紅機率大
news.Content:
中東局勢再度升溫，拖累美股四大指數周一全面收黑。台股在前一交易日創新高後，今（5）日開盤仍小漲3.26點，以40708.4點開出，雖盤中一度受台積電（2330）拉回影響翻黑，但隨聯發科（2454）、鴻海（2317）續強，加上記憶體與低軌衛星族群買盤點火，指數迅速翻紅並急拉179點至40,885.05點再創新高，不過隨後再度翻黑跌逾百點。永誠國際投顧分析師黃宇帆預期，今日市場追價意願可能略為保守，成交量能落在9000億元至1.1兆元之間，不過大盤仍有高機率收「小漲」。

今日值班分析師：永誠國際投顧分析師黃宇帆

黃宇帆表示，原先預期台股在創高後可能出現拉回整理，但今早僅小跌約70點後即迅速翻紅，代表多頭力道仍強勁。目前盤面最關鍵的仍是權值股台積電、聯發科、鴻海和廣達等AI指標股，只要維持強勢，大盤指數「基本上沒有太大問題」，且盤中出現震盪拉回，反而是逢低布局的機會。

至於短線盤勢節奏，黃宇帆分析，早盤10點前易受「隔日沖效應」影響，指數震盪幅度較大，預估上下震盪約200點；但隨時間推進、量能穩定後，指數有望收斂波動。

在盤面焦點方面，記憶體族群有轉強跡象，以南亞科（2408）、華邦電（2344）為代表；PCB產業鏈則具備整體性機會，從載板、銅箔基板一路延伸至上游材料，皆可望受惠需求回溫。其中，鉅橡（8074）近期股價創高，反映小型股在籌碼集中與量能放大下具備強勢表現；被動元件族群亦出現轉強訊號，隨著國巨*（2327）股價墊高創高，帶動華新科（2492）等族群跟進，整體被動元件板塊有機會再度活絡。

台積電供應鏈亦是盤面焦點。黃宇帆指出，近期市場關注竹科龍潭園區擴建計畫與先進製程、先進封裝布局，帶動相關工程與設備廠題材升溫，包括漢唐（2404）及其子公司漢科（3402），受惠無塵室工程與特殊氣體配管需求，近期成交量已逐步放大，後市具備續強機會。

題材股方面，低軌衛星族群在整理後仍具中長線機會。黃宇帆建議觀察華通（2313）等指標股，但提醒投資人避免追高，尤其在爆量或接近漲停時應審慎操作，宜等待震盪時逢低承接。他強調，目前市場資金充沛，但傾向流向位階較低個股，因此建議投資人優先布局低基期標的，以降低高檔震盪風險；至於已創高個股，短線則可適度調節鎖利。

馮萱榕／財經特派記者，主跑財政部、電腦通路、觀光餐飲等

news.Title: 台股早盤漲逾百點 台積電跌25元 聯發科漲停創天價
news.Content:
隨著投資人關注中東地區緊張局勢發展，美股4日主要指數收跌。台北股市今天（5日）開盤漲3.26點，加權股價指數為40708.4點，成交金額新台幣80.43億元；早盤加權指數上漲179.91點，攀高至40885.05點，再創歷史新高。 台積電 最多跌25元，到2250元。

台積電今天股價不漲反跌，早盤滑落至2250元，下跌25元，市值降至新台幣58.34兆元，影響大盤約198點。

聯發科在人工智慧（AI）特殊應用晶片（ASIC）題材持續發酵下，股價延續強勁走勢，開盤跳空漲停達到3155元，再創新天價。其餘權值股漲跌互見，鴻海和日月光投控上揚，台達電走跌。電子類股指數上漲約0.56%。

台股昨天收在40705.14點，美股四大指數終場道瓊工業指數下跌557.37點，跌幅1.13%。標普500指數下跌29.37點，跌幅0.41%。那斯達克指數下滑46.64點，跌幅0.19%。費城半導體指數下跌60.68點，跌幅0.57%。AI晶片龍頭輝達（NVDA-US）上漲0.05%、台積電ADR上漲1.01%。

（責任主編：莊儱宇）

news.Title: Closing the Strait of Hormuz Disrupted 30% of the World's Helium. But There's a Silver Lining for 1 AI Chip Stock.
news.Content: I'm willing to bet that the first thing you think of when I mention the word "helium" is balloons. And true, the lighter-than-air gas is what makes balloons float. But it's also one of the most important, yet also one of the most overlooked, gases for industrial use -- especially for semiconductor production. Helium is the main coolant for the lithographs that etch the silicon patterns on semiconductor wafers . And the war in Iran has crippled the helium industry. Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The helium shortage, caused by disruptions in Qatar, could benefit Micron Technology (MU) more than its competitors.
• South Korea, home to Micron's largest competitors Samsung and SK Hynix, imports 64.7% of its industrial helium from Qatar.
• Micron has diversified its helium sourcing and its US factories are located in the world's largest helium-producing country.
• Micron's partnership with Air Liquide provides a stable gas supply, mitigating reliance on Qatari helium.
• The memory chip shortage, driven by AI demands, is expected to persist until 2030.
news.Keywords: helium shortage, semiconductor production, memory chips, AI demand, supply chain

news.Title: 台股４萬點 狂飆1778點 盤中/收盤雙創新高
news.Content:
台股四日開高走高，收盤首度站上四萬點，盤中與收盤指數、漲點皆創下歷史新高。

（中央社）

記者陳建興∕台北報導

連假期間美股創新高，加上美伊商談停戰，台股四日在台積電創新高價帶領下開高走高，盤中一度飆漲一千八百二十八點八九點，最高達四萬零七百五十五點五二點；終場加權指數勁揚一千七百七十八點五一點、漲幅百分之四點五七，收在四萬零七百零五點一四點，為收盤首度站上四萬點，盤中與收盤指數、漲點皆創下歷史新高。成交值一兆零六十八點八七億元。

自營商買超八十九點四億元、投信買超二十一點一八億元、外資及陸資買超六百六十九點七六億元，三大法人合計買超七百八十點三四億元。外資買超金額為史上第六大。

半導體類股指數漲幅高達百分之六點五七，在聯發科漲停及台積電、股王信驊創新高帶動下，同時點火高價股及權值股全面大漲。盤中四十七檔千金股中，多達十三檔漲停；前二十大權值股中，聯發科、日月光、智邦、致茂均在盤中亮燈漲停，帶動台股上市總市值衝破一百三十兆元。

權值王台積電盤中攀高至二千二百八十五元，上漲一百五十元，創下史上盤中最大上漲金額；收二千二百七十五元，上漲一百四十元，漲幅百分之六，仍創收盤新高價，貢獻大盤漲點達一千一百六十六點九六點。

其他權值股收盤表現，鴻海上漲八元，收二百二十七點五元；聯發科以二千八百七十元攻上漲停；台達電上漲五十五元，收二千二百二十元。ＩＣ設計族群強勢表態，愛普、創意、股王信驊則漲逾百分之六。

封測廠日月光投控、京元電子、力成等均漲停，其餘強勢半導體個股還有南亞科漲停，股后穎崴漲百分之三，設備相關的致茂、鴻勁均漲近百分之九。東元、智邦、研華、華通等也漲停作收。

匯市方面，台股強勢上攻，新台幣早盤勁揚近一角，但隨即回落，盤中數次翻黑；收盤收三十一點六一元，升三點八分，匯價終止連三貶。台北及元太外匯市場總成交金額二十五點一四五億美元。

news.Title: 外資認錯？狂砸670億回頭掃貨　台股血脈噴張刷爆歷史新高
news.Content:
台股今日強勢上漲，加權指數終場大漲1778.51點，收在40,705.14點，不僅刷新收盤歷史新高，也寫下史上最大單日漲點紀錄。成交量同步放大至1.04兆元，在資金全面回流帶動下，三大法人大舉買超780.34億元，其中外資買超669.76億元，創下史上第六大紀錄，成為推升行情的關鍵動能。

從籌碼面觀察，外資終結連續四天賣出轉為強力回補，單日買超近670億元。自營商也買超89.4億元，終止連續兩天賣出的走勢。投信則持續加碼21.18億元，已連續九天買進，顯示內外資同步偏多。

盤面資金動向方面，交易所交易基金（ETF）成交熱度持續升溫。其中，00981A（主動統一台股增長）以45.4萬張成交量居冠，00631L（元大台灣50正2）與00632R（元大台灣50反1）分居二、三名。

進一步觀察外資買盤流向，資金明顯流向高股息ETF與記憶體族群。元大高股息（0056）單日獲外資買超逾5.8萬張居冠，成為最受青睞的高股息基金。個股方面，群創、華邦電與南亞科同步獲資金青睞，其中華邦電明日召開法說會，市場預估可望繳出單季獲利佳績。由於記憶體後市仍看好，法人預期華邦電股價有望回到百元之上。

南亞科今日公佈2026年4月份自結合併營收為新台幣254.91億元，首度突破200億元大關，月增40.29%、年增717.33%，創單月營收歷史新高，顯示記憶體產業景氣持續升溫。

統計數據顯示，今年外資買超前十大交易日中已有四日落在2026年，顯示資金進出節奏加快且規模放大，對台股影響力顯著提升。

news.Title: 台積發哥信驊組隊放煙火！台股噴1778點炸史上最狂｜Yahoo財經掃描
news.Content:
受到企業盈餘創佳績、油價走跌激勵，美股四大指數漲跌互見，道瓊工業指數下跌0.31%，標普500指數上漲0.29%，那斯達克指數上漲0.89%，費城半導體指數上漲0.87%，其中標普500指數、那斯達克指數與費城半導體指數同步刷新歷史收盤新高。個股方面，蘋果財報優於預期帶動股價走揚，微軟、亞馬遜等大型科技股同步收漲，輝達則小幅拉回跌0.6%，顯示科技股買盤仍偏熱，但資金追價力道略有分化；台積電ADR上漲0.41%。

亞股方面部分走揚，日股休市，韓股勁揚5.12%，再創收盤新高，香港恆生指數上漲1.33%，陸股同樣休市。

回到台股，加權指數今日大漲1778.51點、收40,705.14點，漲幅4.57%，創史上最大漲點並站上4萬點大關，成交金額放大至1兆84.4億元； 權王台積電(2330) 強勢領軍，盤中最高衝上2285元，終場大漲140元、收2275元，創下史上盤中最大上漲金額； 聯發科(2454) 、 信驊(5274) 也同步發力，帶動電子權值股氣勢全面點火。

📝盤點熱門股：主動統一台股增長、元大台灣50正2、元大台灣50反1

今日熱門成交股方面，前五名以ETF與電子股為主，顯示資金在指數創高之際持續透過多元工具積極布局。買盤最旺的是 主動統一台股增長(00981A) ，單日成交達45.43萬張居冠，在台股站上4萬點帶動ETF熱度升溫下，資金持續湧入，推升成交動能與股價同步走揚。

其餘ETF方面， 元大台灣50正2(00631L) 走揚、 元大台灣50反1(00632R) 小跌，在大盤強勢上攻背景下，槓桿與反向ETF同步放量，顯示市場多空操作並行、資金進出頻繁。

個股部分，半導體股 聯電(2303) 受惠先前法說會釋出22奈米銷售創高與漲價利多，吸引買盤進駐，帶動股價走揚並推升成交量；記憶體股 旺宏(2337) 則延續產業題材關注度，交投維持熱絡，股價小幅走揚，反映資金持續在電子族群間輪動布局。

📌三大法人買賣超

三大法人今日合計買超780.34億元，籌碼面明顯偏多方。外資買超669.75億元，成為推升盤面最大火力來源；投信買超21.18億元，延續加碼步調，為內資提供支撐；自營商買超89.41億元，操作也偏積極。整體來看，外資強勢回補搭配內資同步偏多，讓法人籌碼呈現全面買超格局。

✨本日議題股：封測概念股

news.Title: The Fed Just Did Something It Hasn't Done Since 1992. Here's What It Means.
news.Content: As expected, the Federal Reserve didn't change its policy rate at last week's meeting. news.Content: You might have heard someone say that the Chinese word for "crisis" means "danger" plus "opportunity." While that would be intriguing if true, it reflects a misunderstanding of Mandarin. However, the connection between danger and opportunity aligns well with Warren Buffett's investing philosophy . Dangers seem to be almost everywhere you look in the current market environment. The ongoing war with Iran continues to affect oil prices. President Trump's tariffs add to concerns about resurging inflation. Some experts warn that the widespread ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Warren Buffett's investment philosophy emphasizes being fearful when others are greedy and greedy when others are fearful.
• He also advises that the stock market transfers money from the impatient to the patient, highlighting the importance of a long-term mindset.
• Buffett's approach involves estimating a company's underlying value, making market uncertainty less concerning and potentially beneficial.
• Coca-Cola (KO) is cited as an example of Buffett's philosophy, bought after the 1987 crash and held as a long-term position.
news.Keywords: investment philosophy, market uncertainty, long-term investing, value investing, risk management

news.Title: Is Nvidia's Deal With Oklo a Game Changer?
news.Content: Surging demand for artificial intelligence (AI) is exposing a huge energy crunch as power supplies become the new bottleneck for data centers. news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia (NVDA) and Oklo (OKLO) are collaborating to blend AI computing with nuclear technology to address the energy crunch for data centers.
• The partnership focuses on using Nvidia's AI infrastructure (digital twins, modeling, simulation) to accelerate Oklo's nuclear fuel development.
• Nvidia is investing in energy infrastructure to support AI hyperscalers' demand for carbon-free electricity, employing a vertical integration strategy.
• Oklo remains pre-revenue with multi-year regulatory and construction timelines, indicating execution risk despite the strategic alliance.
news.Keywords: AI data centers, nuclear technology, energy infrastructure, vertical integration, fuel development

news.Title: Cathie Wood sells $79.9M of strong, surging semiconductor stock
news.Content: When a stock runs 68% in a matter of weeks, even the most convinced bulls start doing the math on what to do next. That’s a name ARK Invest has held through volatile stretches and lean years, only to watch it explode higher as agentic Artificial Intelligence ( AI ) demand sent the semiconductor sector into a full sprint. news.AI_Summary:

• AMD's stock surged 68% in weeks, driven by agentic AI demand in the semiconductor sector.
• ARK Invest's sales of AMD shares were deliberate and staged, with the majority concentrated between April 24 and May 1.
• The shift indicates Wood's higher conviction bets on Alphabet and Meta following their post-earnings reactions.

news.Title: Can Europe Compete With SpaceX Launch Price? Only If Elon Musk Says "Yes."
news.Content: More than a decade ago, SpaceX burst into the commercial space launch market, disrupting the industry with an ultralow $61.2 million price for its Falcon 9 rocket -- and nearly giving Europe a heart attack. That amount was much less than United Launch Alliance was charging in the U.S., and even less than ArianeGroup could profitably charge for its Ariane 5 rockets in Europe. Ariane CEO Alain Charmeau complained that SpaceX was trying to " kick Europe out of space ." And so Europe came up with a solution: It would build a new rocketship. Two of them, actually: ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Europe's Ariane 62 rocket launch cost ESA $96 million, significantly more than the original estimate and comparable to SpaceX's Falcon 9 launch price.
• SpaceX has flexibility in pricing due to its low estimated launch costs ($15 million), allowing for high gross profit margins.
• Ariane relies on annual subsidies from European governments to keep prices affordable, unlike SpaceX's profitable model.
• The article questions whether Europe has succeeded in building a rocket that can compete with SpaceX on price, concluding it has not.

news.Title: 【國發基金聚寶盆2】股利就賺飽！台積電今年有望豪領250億股息 中華電陽明華航全是搖錢樹
news.Content:
國發基金股利領飽飽！除漲幅之外，國發基金長年持股不賣，股利也相當受到市場矚目，除手持165.37萬張台積電，首季就豪領66億元股利，換算下來，一年有望狂領超過250億元股利，此外，國發會預估今年也從中華電信領取6400萬元左右的股利，而貨櫃三雄之一的陽明、航空股華航也是國發會的股息來源之一，今年分別能領取9.2億元與4.2億元的現金股利。

國發基金投資不少台灣上市櫃、新創公司，截至截至去年底，共計有69家新興事業，其中就包含台股最知名的護國神山台積電。

而國發基金持股基本都是長年不賣，因此相較於股價漲幅，真正入袋的反倒是「股利收入」，其中，作為台積電大股東的國發基金手握165.37萬張股票，在今年首季就落袋66億元，換算下來，從季配息制的台積電身上，國發會今年有望領取超過250億元的現金股利。

除台積電是國發基金的搖錢樹之外，其實國發基金持股中也有不少「發股息」出名的個股，如電信一哥中華電，今年將發出每股5.2元股息，不過國發基金持股較少，僅0.16%，換算後約可領6400萬元的現金股利。

貨櫃三雄之一的陽明也名列國發基金持股名單，且持股張數達46萬張，今年陽明發放每股2元現金股利，換算下來，國發基金也能入帳9.2億元的股息。

至於航空股華航也是國發基金的搖錢樹之一，今年每股配發0.82元，手持51.9萬張的國發基金則可以領4.2億元的現金股利，也為國發基金挹注不少財富。

許如鎧／財經特派記者，主跑經濟部、電子電信、能源等

news.Title: 【國發基金聚寶盆1】光靠台積電就賺1.2兆元？國發基金手上這3檔績效不輸神山 最狂飆漲600%
news.Content:
台積電在本周股價「追上股號」，最高一度觸及2330元，也為台股首度寫下一筆4萬點的歷史紀錄。在台積電締造新猷的同時，最大受益人之一莫過於大股東國發基金，光是神山今年來就績效就約50%、賺進1.2兆元。不過除台積電外，國發會手中還有不少飆股今年績效都力壓台積電，包含漲幅超過60%的世界先進，甚至還有大漲接近200%的波若威，都是不輸神山的代表個股，而最狂莫過於興櫃股達運光電，漲幅衝破600%。

台積電今年以來，從1550元一路強漲，於本周強勢登上2330元，股價漲幅高達50%，根據國發基金季報顯示，國發基金截止至去年底仍手握6.38%、約165.37萬張台積電，光看今年績效就大賺約1.2兆元。

不過，若以帳面金額增加的數字來看，雖然以台積電最多，國發基金手中其實仍有不少績效亮眼的個股，如台積電旗下的世界先進，今年以來已經從92.1元強漲至本周高點150元，漲幅力壓台積電高達62.8%，若以今年高點171元計算，漲幅更高達85.6%。

若以150元計算，國發會手握29.86萬張世界先進，大約也賺入172億元。

此外，績效最驚人的還有波若威，國發會手握3033張波若威，今年以來已經從398.5元強漲至本周高點1160元，漲幅力壓台積電高達191%，若以今年高點1315元計算，漲幅更高達230%。

若以1160元計算，國發會手握3033張波若威，大約也賺入23億元。

最驚人的還有興櫃股達運光電，光是今年以來就從4.02元狂飆至28.85元，漲幅617%，漲幅也力壓台積電。

許如鎧／財經特派記者，主跑經濟部、電子電信、能源等

news.Title: Nvidia Jumped Back Above $5 Trillion. When Will It Hit $6 Trillion?
news.Content: Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) first crossed the $5 trillion valuation threshold in October 2025. It then promptly retreated from those levels, but it's bouncing back. Nvidia reached a $5 trillion valuation again in April, and now the question is when it will ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia (NVDA) reclaimed its $5 trillion market cap in April and is projected to reach a $6 trillion valuation before the end of 2026.
• Achieving a $6 trillion valuation requires a 20% stock increase, which is feasible given Nvidia's projected net income of $208 billion in fiscal year 2027.
• Nvidia's upcoming Vera Rubin processors are expected to reduce inference costs by 90% compared to previous generations, driving significant customer orders.
• The company anticipates a combined $1 trillion in data center sales from Blackwell and Vera Rubin processors in 2026 and 2027.
news.Keywords: market capitalization, valuation, AI inference, data center sales, processor technology

news.Title: Oklo vs. NuScale: Which Nuclear Stock Is Better for Maximum Growth Potential?
news.Content: There are a variety of nuclear energy stocks to choose from. Two of my favorite long-term picks are NuScale Power (NYSE: SMR) and Oklo Inc. (NYSE: OKLO) . "Amid surging electricity demand, driven in part by the rise ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Oklo Inc. (OKLO) and NuScale Power (SMR) are developing small modular reactors (SMRs) to meet rising electricity demand, particularly from AI data centers.

• Oklo takes a bespoke approach, pitching smaller designs to AI data center companies, while NuScale targets utility-scale deployments.

news.Keywords: SMR, nuclear energy, AI data centers, energy demand, reactor technology

news.Content: Key Points IDACORP reported Q1 diluted EPS of $1.21 (up from $1.10) and reaffirmed full‑year 2026 guidance of $6.25–$6.45 per share, assuming normal weather/power costs and less than $30 million of additional tax‑credit amortization under Idaho’s Earnings Support Mechanism. Customer counts rose 2.3% year‑over‑year (residential +2.4%) and industrial energy sales increased 5.7% , driven by ramping load from large customers like Micron and Meta and an “incredible” pipeline of large‑load projects stretching into the 2030s with contracts structured so “growth pays for growth.” The company is executing major transmission and resource additions — multiple lines expected by 2028, a 167 ...
news.AI_Summary:

news.Title: 1 Overlooked Detail to Watch as NuScale's SMR Project Moves Forward
news.Content: This could ultimately be one of the biggest disruptions the global energy economy has seen in decades: Europe's first operational small modular nuclear reactor (SMR), which will be using NuScale Energy 's (NYSE: SMR) SMR technology. ​This particular SMR project is a 426-megawatt facility that's expected to come online in about 7 years. While this may seem like a long time, a traditional nuclear power plant can take up to 15 years. Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly" providing the critical ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Europe's first operational small modular nuclear reactor (SMR) using NuScale Energy's (SMR) technology is expected online in about 7 years.
• NuScale's SMR electricity costs are estimated between $89-$102 per megawatt-hour (MWh), higher than solar-plus-battery storage at $66-$92 per MWh.
• Long timelines and prohibitive construction costs are challenges for SMRs, especially with rising global electricity demand from AI and data centers.
• NuScale reported $31.5 million in revenue for 2025, primarily from engineering services and government contracts, with a net loss of approximately $664 million.
news.Keywords: SMR, nuclear power, electricity costs, AI demand, revenue vs cost

He's managing director and senior equity research analyst at Wedbush Securities. Dan, always great to have you on. Dan Ives Always great to be here. So Dan, you said this quarter was a prove it moment for AI . What specifically did it prove to you. To prove that demonization is just starting in terms of their. If you look at big cloud growth numbers, Amazon, Google, Microsoft, I ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Dan Ives believes tech stocks have 12-15% more upside, citing strong cloud growth from Amazon, Google, and Microsoft.
• He highlights Microsoft's strong enterprise AI adoption and Apple's robust quarter and positive outlook as key drivers.
• Ives sees tech stocks up another 12-15% for the rest of the year, driven by money coming off the sidelines and continued AI build-out.
• He recommends Google, Microsoft, Meta (as oversold), and Nvidia, and suggests looking at derivatives of chips like AMD and Micron, and software companies like Palantir and Snowflake.
news.Keywords: tech stocks, AI trade, cloud growth, earnings, analyst outlook

news.Title: Nvidia Is Worth $5 Trillion Once Again. Here's Why It Could Become the First $10 Trillion Stock Within the Next 3 Years.
news.Content: In October, Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) became the world's first company to achieve a $5 trillion market cap. However, the semiconductor giant's stock hit a rough patch after that due to various factors such as concerns about the sustainability of heavy spending on artificial intelligence (AI) infrastructure and how geopolitical issues might affect the company. So, while the broader PHLX Semiconductor Sector index has soared by 40% over the past six months, Nvidia's gains were just 11%. The good news for investors is that Nvidia ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia (NVDA) reclaimed its $5 trillion market cap and is projected to become the first $10 trillion company within three years.
• Nvidia is poised to win in the AI inference era, with upcoming Vera Rubin processors expected to reduce inference costs by 90%.
• The company anticipates a combined $1 trillion in data center sales from Blackwell and Vera Rubin processors in 2026 and 2027.
• Nvidia has partnerships with leading AI companies like Anthropic, Meta Platforms, xAI, and OpenAI, and generated $6 billion in revenue from the physical AI market in 2025.
news.Keywords: AI inference, market cap, processor costs, data center sales, physical AI

news.Title: Meta threatens to pull Facebook and Instagram from New Mexico over child safety trial requirements
news.Content: Tech giant Meta is threatening to cut off access to its social media platforms in New Mexico as a response to the state's legal effort to compel changes to child safety protocols on the platform. Meta and the state of New Mexico are expected to proceed to the second stage of their trial next ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Meta Platforms (META) is threatening to withdraw its apps from New Mexico if required to meet a 99% accuracy threshold for age verification for users under 13.
• A jury awarded New Mexico $375 million after finding Meta misled consumers about platform safety and child protection, and the next trial phase will determine remedies.
• Meta argues that the state's requested safeguards are unfeasible, burdensome, and could force it to create separate apps or withdraw from the state.
• New Mexico's Attorney General Raúl Torrez stated Meta's refusal to implement safeguards shows it prioritizes engagement and profit over child safety.
news.Keywords: social media, child safety, age verification, platform withdrawal, regulatory requirements

news.AI_Summary:

• Archer's stock is volatile, reacting to FAA milestones and partnerships, but also concerns about manufacturing costs and cash burn.

news.Keywords: eVTOL, urban air mobility, FAA certification, cash burn, speculative investment

news.Title: Prediction: This Will Be the Next $4 Trillion Company (and It's Not Microsoft)
news.Content: After Nvidia , Microsoft , Apple , and Alphabet each crossed the $4 trillion mark, investors have been wondering which company will be the next to join (or rejoin) that elite club. With Microsoft (NASDAQ: MSFT) sitting at about $3.1 trillion as of this writing, despite briefly counting itself among the club's members last summer, it might seem like the obvious pick to get back above the threshold first. But after Amazon's (NASDAQ: AMZN) latest earnings update, the e-commerce and cloud giant arguably looks like the better bet. Both companies are riding the same wave: surging demand for artificial intelligence ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Amazon (AMZN) is positioned to potentially become the next $4 trillion company, showing meaningful AWS reacceleration with 28% YoY growth in Q1.
• AWS's momentum has steadily built over the last year, and its backlog ended Q1 at $364 billion, excluding a $100 billion-plus commitment from Anthropic.
• Amazon's chips business (Trainium, Graviton, Nitro) has an annualized revenue run rate of $20 billion, growing at a triple-digit YoY rate.

news.Keywords: AWS, AI infrastructure, cloud computing, capital expenditures, chips business

news.Title: JPMorgan has stark message for investors on Meta stock

JPMorgan downgrades Meta stock JPMorgan analyst Doug Anmuth downgraded Meta to neutral from overweight and cut his price target to $725 from $825 on April 30, according to ...
news.AI_Summary:
• JPMorgan downgraded Meta Platforms (META) to Neutral from Overweight and cut its price target to $725 from $825 after its Q1 earnings.
• The downgrade stems from concerns about Meta's path to competitive returns on heavy AI capex beyond advertising, contrasting with Google Cloud and AWS.
• Meta raised its full-year capex guidance to $125-$145 billion, leading to a projected negative free cash flow of $4 billion in 2026 and $24 billion in 2027.

news.Title: Here's How Much Exposure JPMorgan Chase, Bank of America, Wells Fargo, and Citigroup Have to Private Credit
news.Content: Private credit has certainly been a buzzword this year, as the multitrillion-dollar industry has shown cracks in credit quality, and investors fret that problems in the sector could lead to broader market risks. One area that has come under some scrutiny is the traditional banking system. The industry has ceded market share to private credit due to burdensome regulations stemming from the Great Recession, yet it still lends to various players in private credit. Investors wonder what will happen if private credit lenders encounter problems. Will that spill over into the banking sector? Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The article discusses the exposure of major banks (JPMorgan Chase, Bank of America, Wells Fargo, Citigroup) to private credit.
• Private credit has grown due to banks slowing lending and offering customized products, but faces scrutiny regarding credit quality.
• The focus is on direct lending, where many loans are senior and have floating interest rates.
• Concerns exist about software company loans going bad due to AI-related stock concerns, leading to high redemption requests for private credit funds.
news.Keywords: Private credit, banking sector, non-bank lending, direct lending, software loans, AI concerns, redemption requests

news.Title: Warren Buffett Went Out With a Bang by Selling 77% of His Amazon Stake and Piling Into a Virtual Monopoly That's Soared 13,600% Since Its IPO
news.Content: This isn't your parents' Berkshire Hathaway (NYSE: BRKA) (NYSE: BRKB) anymore. news.Title: 【含積ETF比一比2】今年績效前20強出爐！00981A、00992A等8檔主動式ETF入列 「這檔」狂飆74%奪冠
news.Content:
台積電（2330）近期在AI產業熱潮與政策利多加持下，股價一度衝上2,330元新天價，帶動市場資金湧入「含積ETF」，掀起新一波「拉積盤」行情。《Yahoo股市》統整今年來績效表現最強的20檔含積台股ETF，其中富邦台灣半導體（00892）受惠半導體族群強勢表現，今年來大漲74.54%奪冠，另有包括主動統一台股增長（00981A）、主動群益科技創新（00992A）等8檔主動式ETF同步入列，整體漲幅均達4成以上。

金管會近期政策拍板，放寬台股基金與主動式ETF投資單一個股上限至25%，由原先10%大幅鬆綁，等同替主動式ETF開一道門。市場普遍解讀，此舉將為台積電等績優龍頭帶來更具延續性的資金動能，不僅主動式ETF直接受惠，連帶具高含積比重的被動型ETF也可望同步吸金，推升新一波「拉積盤」行情。

《Yahoo股市》統計今年來績效表現最強的20檔含積台股ETF，漲幅均4成起跳，且前三名更衝上7成以上水準。其中，富邦台灣半導體（00892）受惠AI浪潮持續推升半導體資本支出，帶動相關企業營運動能升溫，加上AI晶片、先進製程與高效能運算需求快速成長，連帶推升測試需求，促使全球探針卡市場維持強勁擴張。由於00892同時涵蓋探針卡族群，成為另一大投資亮點，今年來飆漲74.54%，穩居績效冠軍。

第二名為野村臺灣新科技50（00935），以半導體與次世代通訊為兩大核心布局，聚焦先進製程、記憶體、電源管理等半導體族群，並搭配高速傳輸、低軌衛星與資料中心建設等通訊題材，今年來大漲71.12%；主動統一台股增長（00981A）則以70.67%漲幅躋身第三名，自去年5月底掛牌以來績效表現優異，經理人陳釧瑤更被廣大網友封為「瑤池金母」，引發市場熱議，截至4月30日，規模來到2369.8億元，續創新高。

值得留意的是，本次前20強中共有8檔主動式ETF入列，除了00981A之外，還有主動第一金台股優選（00994A）、主動群益科技創新（00992A）、主動台新優勢成長（00987A）、主動中信台灣卓越（00995A）、主動復華未來50（00991A）、主動野村台灣50（00985A）與主動群益台灣強棒（00982A），全數繳出逾4成漲幅佳績。

馮萱榕／財經特派記者，主跑財政部、電腦通路、觀光餐飲等

news.Title: 【含積ETF比一比1】台積電太貴買不下手？一表看台股ETF「含積量」前20名 6檔股價不到30元
news.Content:
金管會放寬基金與主動式ETF單一個股投資上限至25%的「台積電條款」正式上路，激勵台積電（2330）股價於4月27日衝上2,330元歷史高點，也讓「高含積ETF」成為市場追價焦點。《Yahoo股市》盤點「含積量」前20名台股ETF一次看，其中以有「小台積」之稱的富邦科技（0052）持有近7成最具代表性；同時鎖定「含積量」至少3成以上、目前股價不到30元的「高積低價」ETF，共有6檔順勢出線，適合小資族輕鬆入手。

0052台積電比重68.57%居「含積ETF」之冠

隨著AI伺服器、半導體與高效能運算需求擴大，台股企業盈餘持續上修，推動大盤屢創新高。觀察台股ETF中，共有48檔成分股中有台積電，進一步篩選持有權重前20名，以富邦科技（0052）持有68.57%居冠；其次為富邦台50（006208）與元大台灣50（0050），權重分別為61.55%、61.53%。其餘包括富邦公司治理（00692）、元大MSCI台灣（006203）、富邦摩台（0057）、元大電子（0053），含積量皆超過5成。

以持有張數來看，0050持有台積電高達47萬張遙遙領先，006208亦持有逾11萬張，位列第二名。

6檔股價不到30元！009816最親民

若從「入手門檻」觀察，像是006208、0050這類高含積量傳統ETF雖然績效出色，但入場門檻相對較高，以006208最新收盤價209.75元計算，一張成本高達近21萬元，對於規畫長期存股的小資族而言，可能需要更充裕的資金準備才能有效投資。

而根據CMoney最新統計，目前含積量3成以上、股價低於30元的台股「高積低價」ETF共計6檔，包括中信臺灣智慧50（00912）、凱基台灣TOP50（009816）、玉山市值動能50（009803）、華南永昌優選50（009808）、凱基優選30（00938），以及富邦淨零ESG50（009809）。

以009803為例，最新收盤價為19.16元，等同不到2萬元即可買進一張，今年來更大漲49.57%，績效表現亮眼，絲毫不遜於其他老牌市值型ETF；若觀察009816，股價僅13.05元，相當於一張約1.3萬元即可入手，自今年2月掛牌以來即引爆投資人搶進熱潮，上市不到3個月資產規模便突破千億元，今年以來績效亦達3成水準，讓小資族也能以低門檻間接參與台積電行情。

馮萱榕／財經特派記者，主跑財政部、電腦通路、觀光餐飲等
